author: y4rr
content: Observation: Inventory complete — ferrotorch-distributions exports 28 public distributions: Bernoulli, Beta, Categorical, Cauchy, Dirichlet, Exponential, Gamma, Gumbel, HalfNormal, Independent, Kumaraswamy, Laplace, LogNormal, LowRankMultivariateNormal, MixtureSameFamily, Multinomial, MultivariateNormal, Normal, OneHotCategorical, Pareto, Poisson, RelaxedBernoulli, RelaxedOneHotCategorical, StudentT, TransformedDistribution, Uniform, VonMises, Weibull. Plus kl::kl_divergence with same-family pairs: Normal-Normal, Bernoulli-Bernoulli, Uniform-Uniform, Categorical-Categorical, Laplace-Laplace, Exponential-Exponential, Gamma-Gamma, Poisson-Poisson + cross-family Normal-Uniform, Uniform-Normal, Gamma-Exponential, Exponential-Gamma. CRITICAL: ferrotorch_core::creation::rand/randn use time-seeded xorshift PRNG — not seedable. Hence moment-based comparison (mean/var with MC noise budget) is required by physics, not just preference.
